allow: Bash(python -c "import kagglehub; path = kagglehub.dataset_download\('vishmiperera/children-drawings'\); import os; files = []; [files.extend\([os.path.join\(r,f\) for f in fs]\) for r,_,fs in os.walk\(path\)]; print\('Toplam dosya:', len\(files\)\); print\('Path:', path\); print\('İlk 20 dosya:'\); [print\(f\) for f in files[:20]]")
